content.text: 1. Fault Handling - DIM shall go to the safe state and set a DTC. So has the DTC implemented by Diag Team?
Luo Ellen: few DTC needs to be recorded by SM53 as mentioned in Fault handling section in FSR.
2. Time out signals - Has the COM team implemented it?
Luo Ellen: timeout is detected by SM5 ZHAO Yanqiang (XC-CP/ESW2-CN)
3. Child lock & Suspension Failure Telltales - E2E and timeout signals are available or not?
Luo Ellen: check with developer for SM5 ZHAO Yanqiang (XC-CP/ESW2-CN)
4. In Suspension Failure Telltales what signal are these?
CC#59 ACTIVE SUSPENSION != 01:(Without Continuous Controlled Chassis)
Luo Ellen: CC is short for "Car Configuration"
5. Any Update on Take over warning
Luo Ellen: Still under discussion with customer.
